name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: Democratic establishment undermines a progressive Black woman from House leadership
body:
Establishment Democrats' backroom influencers worked against the campaign of progressive icon Congresswomen Barbara Lee
#
Friends,
We should be celebrating our first progressive female House Democratic Caucus Chair. Why aren't we? Because the establishment is afraid of the new blue wave of progressive women of color ready take the political revolution to Wall Street and the corporate donors that still fund the Democratic Party.
Whether you are a Democrat, Republican, Independent, or non-partisan, the injustices within the Democratic Party hurt all of us. Establishment Democrats' backroom influencers worked against the campaign of progressive icon Congresswomen Barbara Lee in a close 123-113 Caucus vote.
Here is how slowly progress is coming to the United States House: Representative Lee got her start in politics as a delegate for presidential candidate Shirley Chisholm at the 1972 Democratic National Convention. Just 5 years later, Chisholm ran for Caucus Chair in 1977 and received 100 votes.
**Black women's vote share in the election for House Democratic Caucus chair increased by only 13 votes in 41 years. It is time for Democratic leadership to reflect their most loyal base of voters: black women.**
**[Congresswoman Barbara Lee may not be the next House Democratic Caucus Chair, but because of your hard work, she has progressive sisters to help reshape the Democratic Party- women like Congresswomen-elect Ayanna Pressley, Ilhan Omar, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Rashida Tlaib, and Deb Haaland. Chip in $5 right now to support our efforts to transform the Democratic Party.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a720/bed43eb/8ab90fd6/75fc65b3/3626186666/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/new-leaders?refcode=em181130&noskip=true")**
We must continue to push for public policies that make our lives better. We want stronger public schools, Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, and a radical agenda to undo the worst economic inequality in 100 years. We will continue to elect leadership that works for us, even if Congress doesn't.
**[Your involvement is the only way we can transform the Democratic Party into the party of the people, not Wall Street and corporations. Chip in $5 so we can put the pressure on Democrats to support a bold progressive agenda today.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a720/bed43eb/8ab90fd6/75fc65b3/3626186666/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/new-leaders?refcode=em181130&noskip=true")**
Thank you for taking action.
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution
**[DONATE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a720/bed43eb/8ab90fd6/75fc65b3/3626186666/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/new-leaders?refcode=em181130&noskip=true")**
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a720/bed43eb/8ab90fd6/75fc65b2/3626186666/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a720/bed43eb/8ab90fd6/75fc65bd/3626186666/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a720/bed43eb/8ab90fd6/75fc65bc/3626186666/VEsA/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a720/bed43eb/8ab90fd6/75fc65bf/3626186666/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: Jay Inslee
subject: FWD: We're coming up short.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Reaching out one more time

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b3ed/2f5ea88d/7b3eff00/2cbda88d/3339790412/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/inslee-freeze?utm_source=ema_2018-11-30_eom-4&refcode=ema_2018-11-30_eom-4&utm_campaign=eom-4&utm_medium=ema") Friend, Did you see Tracy's message? She's right -- we're down to the wire. With just over two weeks until our fundraising freeze, we really need to make up for lost time. [**Will you please help us get to our $20,000 goal before midnight tonight and make a contribution?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b3ed/2f5ea88d/7b3eff00/2cbda88d/3339790412/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/inslee-freeze?utm_source=ema_2018-11-30_eom-4&refcode=ema_2018-11-30_eom-4&utm_campaign=eom-4&utm_medium=ema") We have a lot to do in the upcoming years before the next election. Let's make sure we're equipped to do it. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee \---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Tracy Newman
Date: Friday, Dec 30, 2018
Subject: We're coming up short Friend, I'll cut to the chase: We're coming up short on what we need to get us through the fundraising freeze. [**Make a donation right now to help us reach our $20,000 goal by midnight!**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b3ed/2f5ea88d/7b3eff00/2cbda88d/3339790412/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/inslee-freeze?utm_source=ema_2018-11-30_eom-4&refcode=ema_2018-11-30_eom-4&utm_campaign=eom-4&utm_medium=ema") Here what's going on: Our last monthly finance reporting deadline before the freeze is in a few hours. We have just days until we are prohibited by law from fundraising throughout the entire legislative session. **And we still need to raise $6,916 before we've reached our goal.** And the stakes couldn't be more real. Now more than ever, having the back of leaders like Jay Inslee couldn't be more important. We need to support climate champions. We need to fight alongside leaders demanding we love and respect new immigrants. We need to show folks fighting to raise the wages of working people that they'll have our support. [**Help Jay Inslee out right now.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b3ed/2f5ea88d/7b3eff00/2cbda88d/3339790412/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/inslee-freeze?utm_source=ema_2018-11-30_eom-4&refcode=ema_2018-11-30_eom-4&utm_campaign=eom-4&utm_medium=ema") Thanks, Tracy Newman | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b3ed/2f5ea88d/7b3eff00/2cbda88d/3339790412/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/inslee-freeze?utm_source=ema_2018-11-30_eom-4&refcode=ema_2018-11-30_eom-4&utm_campaign=eom-4&utm_medium=ema")
---

_Now more than ever, we must support progressive leadership in America. Chip in to show you're with Jay Inslee as we fight for progress in Washington state and around the country._

| [CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b3ed/2f5ea88d/7b3eff00/2cbda88d/3339790412/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/inslee-freeze?utm_source=ema_2018-11-30_eom-4&refcode=ema_2018-11-30_eom-4&utm_campaign=eom-4&utm_medium=ema")
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b3ed/2f5ea88d/7b3eff00/2cbda88c/3339790412/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Resolute Reads
body:
"The inspiring life of former President George Herbert Walker Bush, who died Friday at the age of 94..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f648938686&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [Trump, Obama Praise George H.W. Bush's Inspirational Life of Service](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=be30cf0ed4&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Washington Examiner_
“The inspiring life of former President George Herbert Walker Bush, who died Friday at the age of 94, helped ignite the thousand points of light he saw as illuminating American greatness, hope and opportunity, said President Trump,” Allison Elyse Gualtieri reports. “Through his essential authenticity, disarming wit, and unwavering commitment to faith, family, and country, President Bush inspired generations of his fellow Americans to public service,” President Trump said in a statement.
---
|
---
| [Trump Signs NAFTA Replacement Deal with Mexico, Canada](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7f01d13b9f&e=3ee4985eea)
— _Washington Examiner_
Yesterday, President Donald J. Trump signed a historic trade deal with Mexico and Canada that will replace the outdated NAFTA. “Trump signed the U.S. Mexico Canada trade agreement in Argentina on the side of the G-20 summit,” Pete Kasperowicz reports in the _Washington Examiner_. “This is a model agreement that changes the trade landscape forever, and this is an agreement that first and foremost benefits working people, something of great importance to all three of us here today,” President Trump said.
---
|
---
| [Melania Trump Shows Off White House Decorations](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=62bb582bce&e=3ee4985eea)
—Fox News
First Lady Melania Trump took Fox News host Ainsley Earhardt behind the scenes of the White House Christmas decor the First Lady says represents the “bravery, heart, and patriotism” of our country, Gregg Re writes. The First Lady and Earhardt “toured some of the most iconic locations in the Presidential residence, and the first lady offered personal thoughts on what the display means to her,” Re adds.

[View the decorations in sixty seconds!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e968df68fb&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [Trump, First Lady Participate in Tree Lighting Ceremony](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=aa9a1de406&e=3ee4985eea)
—CBS News
President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump “participated in the 96th National Christmas Tree Lighting ceremony on the Ellipse outside the White House on Wednesday, with the White House grounds fully decked out for the holidays,” CBS News reports. “The president had the crowd count down to the tree lighting with him. The tradition draws hundreds of spectators each year, even in frigid conditions.”

[Watch President Trump and the First Lady lead the National Christmas Tree lighting.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dbcbe4c151&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [DHS: 110 Percent Surge in Migrant Men Using Kids to Enter US, ‘Rampant Fraud’](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a181ca2a18&e=3ee4985eea)
— _Washington Examiner_
“Educated on a legal loophole that lets migrant ‘families’ with kids enter the United States, the Homeland Security Department reported Tuesday that men showing up with kids at the border has spiked 110 percent in just the last two years,” Paul Bedard reports. “The department noted that children could be used by smugglers and drug traffickers to enter the country. Families are also using fraud to game the immigration system. The department said that 170 families have been caught lying about their relationships to enter the U.S.”
---
|
---
| [US Consumer Spending Up Strong 0.6 Percent in October](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1a04981398&e=3ee4985eea)
— _The Associated Press_
“Consumers boosted their spending in October at the fastest pace in seven months, while their incomes rose by the largest amount in nine months — both good signs for future economic growth,” Martin Crutsinger reports. “Consumer spending rose a sharp 0.6 percent last month, the Commerce Department reported Thursday. It was the biggest increase since a similar gain in March.”
---
|
---
| [Ivanka Trump Praises the ‘Laboratories of Innovation’ Like Idaho During School Visit](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=124605c170&e=3ee4985eea)
— _Idaho Statesman_
Students at Wilder Elementary School greeted two special guests this week: Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump and Apple CEO Tim Cook. The two guests “embarked on a nearly hourlong tour of the school, visiting classrooms and watching students demonstrate their technological skills on the handheld devices Apple provided the school district nearly three years ago,” Cynthia Sewell reports. “This is what is so exciting, the harnessing of technology in conjunction with incredible educators to create this type of really personalized learning experience,” Ms. Trump said.
---
|
---
| [Zinke: What It Will Take to Prevent Deadly Wildfires](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=80e6bec6ef&e=3ee4985eea)
—CNN
“President Donald Trump and I both saw the devastation of the fire on our recent trips to California: piles of rubble recognizable as houses only by their chimneys and charred appliances, and vehicles melted to the pavement in pools of molten aluminum,” Secretary of the Interior Ryan Zinke writes. “We also saw the heroism of firefighters, first responders and volunteers working together to battle the blaze and help the community.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9249da50cd&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bf149c7fa5&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=08b2884277)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---
